column1: # The five base parameter sets are benchmarked; the "f" (fast keygen), "pc"
# (plaintext-confirmation) and "pcf" variants from libmceliece are not shown.
# Keygen is variable-time and slow (tens to hundreds of ms), so iters is low.
# Columns: file, name, pk, sk, ct, ss, iters, set (libmceliece symbol infix mceliece_kem_<set>_*)
